violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Fresh cut fruit case at 44-46F.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Shelves are rusty in Deli walk in cooler.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in fresh fruit and in meat dept. cutting room. -Clean utility carts in deli.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine. -Deli dishwasher only reached temp of 150F on contact.--Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. -D/W in deli need cleaned inside and oiut.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors in all perishable departments need more thorough cleaning.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Shelving in deli cooler is rusty.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in fresh cut walk in, bakery walk in cooler. -Clean dust pan in deli. -Clean bake racks in bakery.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Clean inside and out of deli dishwasher.--Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine. -Deli d/w...154F and 155F on contact.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor edges in deli need cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Floors need repainted in bakery.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
